news.headline: Eli Lilly stock has surged 55% this year, considering entry into sleep apnea market. Is it a buy now?
news.summary: Should investors consider buying Eli Lilly stock as the company gears up to enter the obstructive sleep apnea treatment market? With LLY stock soaring 55% this year, many are wondering if it is a smart buy at the moment. The potential weight-loss opportunity adds to the appeal for investors looking to capitalize on this pharmaceutical company's growth.

news.headline: FDA considering approval for Novavax's Covid vaccine. Stock pulled back from 2-year high. Is NVAX a buy now?
news.summary: Novavax saw a decline in its stock price after reaching a near two-year peak this month. With the latest development of FDA potentially approving Novavax's Covid vaccine, investors are deliberating whether it is a good time to purchase NVAX stock.

news.headline: Micron's disappointing guidance caused a sell-off, dragging other semiconductor stocks down. Market reacted negatively on Thursday.
news.summary: On Thursday, semiconductor stocks experienced a downturn after Micron Technology, a leading memory-chip maker, issued disappointing guidance. This resulted in Micron's stock dropping and dragging down other top semiconductor stocks. The market reacted to this news, leading to a sell-off in the semiconductor sector. Investors were concerned about the impact of this guidance on the industry as a whole, with Micron's performance influencing the overall market sentiment. This event underscores the importance of individual companies' guidance on the broader market landscape.

news.headline: Software stocks surged as semiconductor stocks faltered. Palantir up 46% in 2024, Salesforce down 3%. Market rotation observed.
news.summary: Software stocks experienced a notable surge on Thursday amidst a noticeable shift away from the semiconductor sector. During the year to date, Palantir stock has seen a substantial increase of almost 46%, contrasting with Salesforce stock which has declined by 3%. This upward trend in software stocks comes as investors engage in profit-taking from artificial intelligence (AI) semiconductor companies.

news.headline: ProStart program reaches record 214,000 students in 2023-2024 school year, providing industry-focused education.
news.summary: A program in high schools nationwide, for the 2023-2024 academic year, has successfully engaged 214,000 students through industry-supported career and technical education. This initiative focused on preparing students for future roles in sectors such as culinary arts. The program's impact was felt across various regions, illustrating a significant reach in cultivating skills among high schoolers.

news.headline: Dr. Reddy's to acquire Nicotine replacement therapy brand Nicotinell, generating GBP 217 million in revenues in 2023.
news.summary: Dr. Reddy's Laboratories has reached an agreement with Haleon plc to acquire its global portfolio of consumer healthcare brands in the Nicotine Replacement Therapy category, excluding the US. The acquisition includes Nicotinell, Haleon's leading NRT brand present in over 30 countries. Other brands such as Nicabate, Thrive, and Habitrol in Australia, Canada, and New Zealand will also be acquired. Nicotinell is the second-largest brand in the NRT category globally, generating approximately GBP 217 million in revenues in 2023. This move aims to strengthen Dr. Reddy's OTC business, extending its presence in international markets outside the US and enhancing its OTC brand portfolio significantly.

news.headline: Beam Therapeutics has dosed first patient in Phase I/II AATD study with BEAM-302 to treat genetic disorder. Stock has declined 8.7% year to date.
news.summary: Beam Therapeutics Inc. has initiated a phase I/II study for BEAM-302, an in vivo base editing therapy targeting alpha-1 antitrypsin deficiency (AATD). The trial aims to assess safety, efficacy, pharmacodynamics, and pharmacokinetics, with the goal of determining the optimal dosage. AATD is a genetic disorder causing emphysema and liver disease, with no approved cures. Beam received approval for the clinical trial in March 2024 from the UK regulatory agency. The company's shares have dropped 8.7% this year compared to a 4.6% industry decline. They are also developing BEAM-301 for genetic diseases.

news.headline: Restaurant Brands International Inc. (NYSE: QSR) benefits from comps growth, with Q4 2024 showing 6.9% in Tim Hortons, 3.8% in Burger King, and 5.7% in Popeyes. Earnings estimates for 2024 and 2025 have been revised upwards, despite high costs. Shares dropped 11.2% in the past six months but gained 3.1% in the past month. Expansion efforts in 2023 focused on over 75 markets beyond the US and Canada.
news.summary: Restaurant Brands International Inc. (NYSE: QSR) is experiencing growth in comparable sales, aided by strong digital ordering and strategic investments. Despite concerns about high costs and a softening consumer environment, the company's earnings estimates for 2024 and 2025 have been raised. The stock has shown resilience, gaining 3.1% in the past month while the industry declined by 15.2%. In Q4 2024, Tim Hortons, Burger King, and Popeyes reported comps of 6.9%, 3.8%, and 5.7% respectively. The company is focused on global expansion by strengthening existing markets and entering new ones, with plans to accelerate growth through franchise agreements. In 2023, over 75 new markets were targeted, securing 15 development and master franchise deals.

news.headline: NetActuate gains SOC 2 Type 2 Certification, prioritizing security and reliability in global services.
news.summary: NetActuate has recently obtained SOC 2 Type 2 Certification as of June 27, 2024. This certification demonstrates the company's dedication to ensuring security and reliability in their global infrastructure services. NetActuate is a prominent provider of infrastructure and network services worldwide. The certification serves as a testament to their commitment to maintaining high standards in cybersecurity and operational integrity.

news.headline: Hydrolix launches 'Powered by Hydrolix Partner Program' following 100% YoY revenue growth, targeting infrastructure, CDN, and cloud security providers.
news.summary: A new initiative called the 'Powered by Hydrolix Partner Program' has been established to enhance collaborations with infrastructure, CDN, and cloud security providers. Hydrolix, a company based in Portland, Oregon, announced this development on June 27, 2024. The company, known for its innovative approach to streaming data lakes, aims to leverage this program to bolster its partnerships and drive success in the industry.

news.headline: JSMM achieves record success with AI-powered digital campaigns for luxury real estate company, JW Group in Telluride, CO.
news.summary: JSMM conducted an innovative case study with JW Group, a high-end real estate firm in Telluride, Colorado. Through the use of advanced AI technology, JSMM achieved remarkable levels of buyer engagement for JW Group. This cost-effective strategy resulted in a significant increase in metrics, with a notable uptick in lead generation by 40% and a remarkable 60% boost in sales conversions. The successful collaboration between JSMM and JW Group showcases the power of AI in revolutionizing marketing approaches within the luxury real estate sector.

news.headline: Nosto named in Most Loved Workplaces for LGBTQ+ 2024 and Newsweek's list of top 100 global Most Loved Workplaces for 2024.
news.summary: Today, Nosto, the top Commerce Experience Platform (CXP), was chosen for its commitment to openness, transparency, collaboration, and diversity. This announcement was made in New York on June 27, 2024. Nosto, a significant player in the CXP industry, has been recognized for its exceptional performance and dedication to these values. This recognition underscores Nosto's position as a leading provider in its field.

news.headline: Fax App introduces premium online faxing for iPhone and Android, ensuring HIPAA-compliant service 24/7 worldwide. Cyprus, June 27, 2024.
news.summary: Utilize a reliable and HIPAA-compliant faxing service on your mobile device with Fax App's premium 24/7 solution, accessible to iPhone and Android users globally. On June 27, 2024, Fax App, headquartered in LIMASSOL, Cyprus, declared its position as the top mobile app for faxing and introduced a groundbreaking feature set to revolutionize the industry.

news.headline: Tap Water Company's Tap Hydrator named 2024 Bottle Filler of the Year for its filtration & design. - Dallas, June 27, 2024.
news.summary: Tap Water Company's latest product, The Tap Hydrator, has been awarded the prestigious title of 2024 Bottle Filler of the Year by Best Bottle Fillers for its exceptional filtration abilities and innovative design. This recognition was announced in Dallas on June 27, 2024. The Tap Hydrator has stood out among competitors for its superior features, solidifying its position as a top choice for consumers looking for high-quality bottle fillers.

news.headline: Apollo partners with MDView to enhance medical imaging with arcc® integration. Creates enterprise-wide second opinion platform.
news.summary: Apollo has collaborated with MDView to improve medical imaging and second opinion services by integrating arcc® technology. The partnership was announced in Tysons, VA on June 27, 2024. Apollo, known for its diverse medical imaging solutions, aims to enhance services through this collaboration with MDView.

news.headline: Crow Canyon Software has released NITRO Copilot for HR, IT, and more to enhance process automation, promising faster service and improved satisfaction. 138 characters.
news.summary: A new AI-powered business process automation has been introduced by Crow Canyon Software to assist M365 and Teams users in receiving quicker service. This innovation aims to enable technicians to concentrate on pressing matters while aiding managers in enhancing satisfaction levels. The launch took place in BENICIA, Calif. on June 27, 2024.

news.headline: Keenan Financial named one of 543 companies on Inc.'s Best Workplaces list for 2024, excelling in workplace culture.
news.summary: Keenan Financial, a Boston-based independent financial advisory firm, has achieved recognition by being included in Inc.'s 2024 Best Workplaces list. This prestigious accolade acknowledges companies that stand out in fostering outstanding workplace environments and positive cultures. Among the 543 selected companies, Keenan Financial has proven its commitment to creating a top-tier workplace setting.

news.headline: Scott Sheldon expands to UK with new office in Birmingham, marking launch of Scott Sheldon Limited UK.
news.summary: Scott Sheldon, LLC, a company based in Northeast Ohio, has recently opened a new office in Birmingham, England. This move signifies the establishment of Scott Sheldon Limited UK and highlights the company's dedication to enhancing its presence in the UK market. This strategic expansion aims to bolster the company's operations and reach in the region.

news.headline: American College of Lifestyle Medicine creates Innovators Council to promote lifestyle medicine with key entities for healthcare transformation.
news.summary: A council has been formed in St. Louis, Missouri on June 27, 2024, consisting of prominent risk-bearing organizations such as health systems, health plans, ACOs, and major self-funded employers. The council aims to drive healthcare transformation by focusing on the Quintuple Aim.

news.headline: Prescribe FIT raises $4.8M in Series A to advance musculoskeletal healthcare with remote patient monitoring and AI.
news.summary: Prescribe FIT, a company offering remote patient monitoring (RPM) tech and lifestyle health coaching services, is excited to announce the successful closure of its Series A funding round. During the last year, Prescribe FIT has seen remarkable growth, with its revenue tripling.

news.headline: Supreme Court rules against S.E.C., claiming tribunals without juries unconstitutional, curbing regulatory power.
news.summary: In executive agencies, tribunals commonly preside over enforcement actions without juries. However, the court's conservative supermajority declared this practice unconstitutional, highlighting the need for reform in the system.

news.headline: Alex Hoffmann appointed GM of Edenred Pay, NA with 30 years experience in payments. Leading growth of solutions in Florida.
news.summary: In Bonita Springs, Florida, as of June 27, 2024, Alex Hoffmann has joined Edenred Pay North America, bringing over 30 years of expertise in expanding payment services and fostering creativity. Hoffmann will oversee the enhancement of the company's top-tier Invoice-to-Pay offerings. Situated in Florida, he will be under the supervision of Gilles.

news.headline: PA law firm Panitch Schwarze has attorneys named as top IP lawyers for 2024 by Managing Intellectual Property.
news.summary: In Philadelphia on June 27, 2024, Panitch Schwarze Belisario & Nadel LLP revealed that their Pennsylvania intellectual property lawyers have been recognized as top attorneys in the international arena. Managing Intellectual Property acknowledged the expertise of these attorneys, led by Travis W. The exact rankings and specific details regarding this recognition were not provided.

news.headline: ClientSuccess acquires Baton to improve onboarding & implementation solutions, aiming for faster, scalable solutions.
news.summary: ClientSuccess has recently completed the acquisition of Baton, a prominent customer onboarding and implementation platform. This acquisition is intended to bolster ClientSuccess's customer success portfolio by providing quicker and more scalable solutions for customer onboarding. The strategic move is expected to streamline project management, resulting in significant improvements for both companies. The acquisition of Baton marks a significant development in ClientSuccess's growth strategy, expanding their capabilities for customer success.

news.headline: RoviSys expands global automation services, showcasing engineering excellence. AURORA, Ohio, June 27, 2024.
news.summary: RoviSys, a well-known company specializing in automation and information solutions, announced on June 27, 2024, its enhanced Automation Service & Support. This initiative highlights the firm's dedication to engineering excellence across all project phases. Based in Aurora, Ohio, RoviSys offers a wide range of services to its clients. The company's commitment to quality is evident in its comprehensive approach to automation services. Established as a leader in the industry, RoviSys continues to prioritize excellence in its operations.

news.headline: Telemedicine program Addiction TeleMD in California and Mississippi offers Suboxone treatment for Opiate Use Disorder. Founded by Dr. Kevin M. Passer, the service provides remote consultations for addiction-related issues.
news.summary: Addiction TeleMD is a prominent telemedicine platform specializing in addressing Opiate Use Disorder and various addiction issues. Established by Dr. Kevin M. Passer, M.D. FAPA FABPM FASAM, the service offers remote consultations for individuals seeking treatment for addiction. Their goal is to provide convenient and empathetic healthcare services to those struggling with substance abuse, with a particular focus on Opiate Use Disorder.

news.headline: ASKP3 addresses concerns and proposes solutions for safe at-home ketamine treatment. Patients turning to online providers due to lack of insurance.
news.summary: ASKP3 has raised concerns that individuals are turning to online services for medical treatment, possibly because of inadequate insurance coverage. This issue comes to light in Houston on June 27, 2024. The growing popularity and debate surrounding at-home ketamine have prompted discussions, with reports highlighting a rise in telehealth utilization for this purpose.

news.headline: New scholarship fund - Controllers for a Cause™ - aims to expand CPA pipeline and provide scholarships for students taking the CPA Exam; developed by Controllers Council™ and administered by AICPA Foundation.
news.summary: A recently launched program known as the Controllers for a Cause™ Scholarship Fund aims to provide financial assistance to individuals pursuing their Certified Public Accountant (CPA) certification. This initiative is specifically designed to support students preparing for the CPA Exam. The fund is established by the Controllers Council™ and managed by the AICPA Foundation, which is a charitable entity affiliated with the American Institute of Certified Public Accountants (AICPA). The program's primary focus is to help aspiring CPAs by offering scholarships to aid in their exam preparations.

news.headline: Sierra College and partners organize summit for Placer County's employers and educators to boost job readiness.
news.summary: On June 18, stakeholders from prominent companies and educational institutions in Placer County convened at the Sierra College Rocklin Campus to collaborate on innovative methods to equip young individuals and adults in the workforce for well-compensated roles. This gathering took place in Rocklin, California, and aimed to address the pressing need to prepare individuals for lucrative employment opportunities.

news.headline: Gabriel & Co. introduces digital Certificates of Authenticity with GIA diamond verification for all sizes.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in New York, Gabriel & Co., a renowned brand in bridal and fine jewelry, is paving the way in the fine jewelry sector. They are revolutionizing the market by unveiling a digital Certificate of Authenticity (COA) featuring GIA natural diamond verification for diamonds of all sizes. This innovative step ensures the authenticity and quality of the diamonds used in their products.

news.headline: Bragg Gaming launches new games and RGS technology with BetMGM in Pennsylvania, expanding from New Jersey and Michigan. Players access Atomic Slot Lab titles and Fuze promotional tools, enhancing player engagement. Entry into Pennsylvania market to enhance company's innovative content commitment.
news.summary: Bragg Gaming Group Inc. (NASDAQ:BRAG) has expanded its partnership with BetMGM by introducing its latest games and Remote Game Server technology in Pennsylvania. This comes after successful launches in New Jersey in 2023 and Michigan in 2022. Players in Pennsylvania can now access titles from Bragg's Atomic Slot Lab and upcoming content from Wild Streak Gaming and other partners under the Powered By Bragg program. The company's RGS technology features Fuze promotional tools, enhancing player engagement. Bragg sees the Pennsylvania gaming market entry as a significant step towards delivering innovative gaming content across North America. Online gaming has been a key growth driver for BRAG.

news.headline: Novo Nordisk's hypertension drug study fails, causing $5.7 billion impairment loss, impacting profit growth by 6%.
news.summary: Novo Nordisk faced a setback with a 2.2% stock drop on June 26 following the failure of a late-stage study evaluating ocedurenone in treating patients with uncontrolled hypertension and advanced CKD. The company will recognize an impairment loss of DKK 5.7 billion in Q2 2024 due to this. This impairment will affect the operating profit growth by about 6 percentage points, revising the previously expected growth of 22% to 30%. Novo Nordisk will update its financial outlook on August 7, 2024. The study did not meet its primary endpoint of reducing systolic blood pressure, leading to its halt.

news.headline: Charles River Laboratories' RMS business benefits from CRADL initiative amid challenging global environment. Increased NHP revenues and geographic growth in small research models. CRADL's flexible model drives CR growth, with accelerated growth expected in 2024. Expanding services through acquisitions in drug discovery and early-stage development.
news.summary: Charles River Laboratories' Research Models and Services (RMS) business is benefitting from the Charles River Accelerator and Development Labs (CRADL) initiative. The RMS segment is experiencing high demand from clients in basic research and non-clinical drug candidate screening fields. The business is witnessing growth in NHP revenues and small research models globally. The Insourcing Solutions (IS) segment is also showing strong growth due to the CRADL initiative, enabling clients to access laboratory space without internal infrastructure investment. Charles River is expanding CRADL's footprint and accelerating growth rates. The company is broadening its products and services through acquisitions, such as the 2021 acquisition of Retrogenix. Despite a challenging global business environment, the stock carries a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold).

news.headline: Niman Ranch’s Paul Willis honored for leadership in sustainability at Fancy Food Show. Grew network to 600+ farmers.
news.summary: In New York this week, at the Fancy Food Show, Paul Willis, the Founding Hog Farmer of Niman Ranch, was honored with the Specialty Food Association Leadership Award for Sustainability. Starting from his own family farm, Paul has expanded Niman Ranch into a network of more than 600 Certified Humane® independent family farmers and ranchers. They raise pork, beef, and lamb sustainably, without the use of antibiotics, hormones, or crates. The meats from Niman Ranch are featured in top restaurants across the United States, embodying values of sustainability and ethical farming practices.

news.headline: Tempest unveiled Sports Tourism Index™ 2.0, enhancing features and benefits for destinations and events organizations.
news.summary: In Philadelphia on June 27, 2024, Tempest unveiled a state-of-the-art platform offering a multitude of advantages for destination organizations and sports events rights holders. The enhanced features include significant upgrades to existing capabilities, promising an innovative experience. This latest development marks a significant milestone for Tempest in the digital landscape.

news.headline: Website "BeforeDuringAfter" launched by Texas organizations to aid small businesses in disaster prep.
news.summary: A collaborative effort between various Texas organizations has led to the creation of BeforeDuringAfter, a comprehensive website geared towards aiding small businesses in navigating through disasters. Launched in Houston on June 27, 2024, this platform serves as a vital resource offering guidance on preparation, response, and recovery processes. Through a unique public-private partnership, the website aims to equip businesses with the necessary tools to effectively manage crises. The platform boasts a wide array of functions, making it an indispensable tool for businesses in Texas seeking assistance during turbulent times.

news.headline: Info-Tech Research Group outlines strategies for local governments to improve IT services for delivery, innovation, and data security.
news.summary: The most recent blueprint from Info-Tech Research Group offers guidance for local governments on tackling IT obstacles tied to service delivery, innovation, and data security. The research equips public sector IT leaders with practical advice to shift from passive roles to actively addressing these issues.

news.headline: NSC reports on using technology to prevent worker injuries and save lives, where a worker dies every 96 mins in the US.
news.summary: A recent report by Work to Zero has revisited the leading workplace dangers based on their 2020 study. The research highlights the potential of innovative technology in reducing risks at work. In the US, there is a tragic occurrence as a worker loses their life approximately every 96 minutes, with a total of almost 5,500 fatal work-related injuries reported in 2022. The study sheds light on the pressing need for advanced solutions to enhance workplace safety and prevent such incidents.

news.headline: TÜV Rheinland hosts Welcome Reception for ICPHSO members in its new Bentonville Laboratory.
news.summary: In Bentonville, Arkansas on June 27, 2024, TÜV Rheinland, a prominent company in testing, inspection, and certification services, hosted esteemed members of the International Consumer Product Health and Safety Organization (ICPHSO) at its recently upgraded and moved laboratory.

news.headline: Fairfax City and Town of Vienna address culinary workforce shortage by partnering with George Mason University - June 27, 2024.
news.summary: In Fairfax City, Virginia on June 27, 2024, it was reported that nearby restaurants are facing challenges in hiring skilled employees. To address this issue, the Town of Vienna Economic Development and Fairfax City Economic Development have collaborated with George Mason University. This partnership aims to solve the recruitment struggles faced by local restaurants.

news.headline: Brent Crude futures reach $86.39/bbl, increasing by $1.14 (1.34%).
Montgomery Partners celebrates 40 years with a new visual identity and website. Firm specializes in multifamily real estate.
news.summary: In Mill Valley, California on June 27, 2024, a multifamily real estate investment firm, Montgomery Partners, celebrates its 40th anniversary with the introduction of a revamped brand and a modern website. This transformation marks a significant moment for the company as it looks to the future with an updated image and improved online presence.

news.headline: LLCP buys NSL Analytical Services with management partnership, deal figures undisclosed. Los Angeles private equity firm acquisition.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on June 27, 2024, Levine Leichtman Capital Partners ("LLCP"), a private equity firm, revealed the acquisition of NSL Analytical Services, Inc. ("NSL") along with management. The Los Angeles-based firm did not disclose the financial specifics of the deal.

news.headline: Notcoin, a Telegram game, teases a 'fresh start' as it distributes millions in NOT coins, linked to TON project Lost Dogs Co.
news.summary: After leading the way in Telegram gaming, Notcoin is teasing its upcoming plans, possibly involving the TON venture Lost Dogs Co.

news.headline: Global power system simulation software market to reach $3,316.0 million by 2033 from $1,456.8 million in 2023, growing at 7.57% CAGR.
news.summary: A report titled "Power System Simulation Software Market - A Global and Regional Analysis: Focus on Application, Product, and Region - Analysis and Forecast, 2023-2033" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com. The market for power system simulation software is anticipated to achieve a value of $3,316.0 million by 2033, increasing from $1,456.8 million in 2023, at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.57% between 2023 and 2033. This market is experiencing significant growth worldwide.

news.headline: Bixby Land Company rebrands to Bixby Capital Management, focusing on capital management for institutions, pension funds, private individuals.
news.summary: Bixby Land Company is now Bixby Capital Management, based in Newport Beach, Calif. The rebrand signifies the company's shift towards institutional and private capital management and better aligns its brand with its business strategy. Known for its excellence in capital management, the Bixby team has been a trusted partner for institutions, pension funds, and private individuals. This strategic move emphasizes the company's commitment to clarity and alignment in its operations.

news.headline: Award-winning nonprofit Solari Crisis & Human Services expands to Colorado, will be provider for 988 and statewide crisis line from call center in Denver area.
news.summary: Solari Crisis & Human Services, an acclaimed nonprofit, has been chosen as Colorado's designated provider for the 988 statewide crisis line. The organization will operate the call center from the Denver area. The agreement, set to last five years, was signed on June 27, 2024.

news.headline: August WTI Crude on NYMEX settles at $81.74/barrel, rising by 84 cents, 1.04% gain.
Gasoline July futures on NYMEX close at $2.5456 per gallon.
July NYMEX Diesel futures close at $2.5476/gal.
